Localization.Description: Attempt to permanently delete one or more secrets

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {event_src.host} permanently deleted one or more secrets in directory {object.path} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {event_src.host} failed to permanently delete one or more secrets in directory {object.path} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
